title: Fix category filtering (All, Girls Only, Boys Only, Co-Living) on Home page

requirements.text: Fix the category filter functionality on the Home page (frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx) so that selecting 'All Hostels', 'Girls Only', 'Boys Only', or 'Co-Living' correctly filters the displayed hostel listings. Investigate whether the issue is in the CategoryFilter component state, the query hook (useGetHostelsByCategory vs useGetAllHostels), or the filtering logic applied to the hostel list, and ensure selecting each category tab shows only hostels matching that category (or all hostels for 'All').

quotes: all hostels,girls only,boys only,co-living not working ,fix it

acceptanceCriteria: Selecting 'All Hostels' displays every hostel in the listings grid
Selecting 'Girls Only' displays only hostels with category 'Girls'
Selecting 'Boys Only' displays only hostels with category 'Boys'
Selecting 'Co-Living' displays only hostels with category 'Co-Living'
The active/selected category tab is visually highlighted
Switching between category tabs updates the listings grid immediately without a page reload
If no hostels match the selected category, the empty-state UI is shown

requirements.text: Verify and fix the backend category filtering logic in backend/main.mo so that the getHostelsByCategory function (or equivalent) correctly matches and returns hostels whose category field equals the requested category string (e.g. 'Girls', 'Boys', 'Co-Living'). Ensure the category values stored in the seed data and returned by the backend exactly match the values expected by the frontend filter.

quotes: all hostels,girls only,boys only,co-living not working ,fix it

acceptanceCriteria: The backend getHostelsByCategory function returns only hostels whose category matches the requested value
Category strings in seed data match exactly what the frontend CategoryFilter passes to the query (case and spelling)
Calling getHostelsByCategory with 'Girls' returns all girls hostels and none from other categories
Calling getHostelsByCategory with 'Boys' returns all boys hostels and none from other categories
Calling getHostelsByCategory with 'Co-Living' returns all co-living hostels and none from other categories

constraints: Do not change the Hostel data model schema
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Adding new hostel categories beyond Girls, Boys, Co-Living
Changing the visual design of the CategoryFilter component
Modifying search, price range, or sort filter functionality
